item.title: Corvette Deal Conditions and Ownership Insights
item.description: A Corvette-focused discussion about a deal with conditions, plus practical car ownership context. What would you ask for before handing over the keys?

media:content.media:title: Corvette Deal Conditions and Ownership Insights
media:content.media:description: A Corvette-focused discussion about a deal with conditions, plus practical car ownership context. What would you ask for before handing over the keys?

item.title: I Got Soaked for This
item.description: A reaction to a frustrating vehicle or dealership situation leads to disbelief over what was delivered. What went wrong in the deal?

media:content.media:title: I Got Soaked for This
media:content.media:description: A reaction to a frustrating vehicle or dealership situation leads to disbelief over what was delivered. What went wrong in the deal?

item.title: Why a Customer Is Taking a Dealer to Court
item.description: A dealership dispute escalates into legal action as a customer challenges what was sold or promised. What triggered the decision to go to court?

media:content.media:title: Why a Customer Is Taking a Dealer to Court
media:content.media:description: A dealership dispute escalates into legal action as a customer challenges what was sold or promised. What triggered the decision to go to court?

item.title: Did My Wife Mess Up Buying This 3500?
item.description: A real-world truck purchase raises questions about value, condition, and whether the deal made sense after everything is revealed. What issues come up after the buy?

media:content.media:title: Did My Wife Mess Up Buying This 3500?
media:content.media:description: A real-world truck purchase raises questions about value, condition, and whether the deal made sense after everything is revealed. What issues come up after the buy?

item.title: Exposing Car Lots: Pricing and Dealer Insights
item.description: A look at car lots, pricing, and dealership practices from a real-world perspective. What should buyers watch for when comparing vehicles, features, and ownership costs?

media:content.media:title: Exposing Car Lots: Pricing and Dealer Insights
media:content.media:description: A look at car lots, pricing, and dealership practices from a real-world perspective. What should buyers watch for when comparing vehicles, features, and ownership costs?

item.title: Questions to Avoid at the Dealership
item.description: Certain questions at a dealership can unintentionally weaken your negotiating position or complicate the buying process. Which ones should buyers avoid asking too early?

media:content.media:title: Questions to Avoid at the Dealership
media:content.media:description: Certain questions at a dealership can unintentionally weaken your negotiating position or complicate the buying process. Which ones should buyers avoid asking too early?

item.title: Top 5 Vehicles to Buy for $10,000 or Less
item.description: A practical look at five vehicles that can be bought for $10,000 or less. Useful for shoppers comparing value, pricing, and everyday ownership costs. Which of these budget-friendly options would you choose?

media:content.media:title: Top 5 Vehicles to Buy for $10,000 or Less
media:content.media:description: A practical look at five vehicles that can be bought for $10,000 or less. Useful for shoppers comparing value, pricing, and everyday ownership costs. Which of these budget-friendly options would you choose?

item.title: If You Know This Button, You Know Older Cars
item.description: A simple car feature can reveal a lot about how vehicles have changed over time. This video looks at a familiar button from older cars and why it stands out to longtime drivers.

media:content.media:title: If You Know This Button, You Know Older Cars
media:content.media:description: A simple car feature can reveal a lot about how vehicles have changed over time. This video looks at a familiar button from older cars and why it stands out to longtime drivers.
